data.title: Inflation issues in Ethereum-driven by token bloat; competitors Solana, Celestia, and NEAR tackling the problem. Ethereum criticized for unchecked token creation on Layer-2 networks leading to devaluation. Unchecked token issuance leading to criticism and calls for reduced supply. Ethereum's investment case questioned due to declining transactions and revenues. Critics argue shrinking token supply will enhance asset value and attract investors. Ethereum facing criticism for allowing unchecked token creation leading to devaluation and investment concerns.
data.description: Ethereum is facing criticism for allowing its Layer-2 networks to issue tokens without considering transaction volumes, leading to token bloat and devaluation. Competitors like Solana, Celestia, and NEAR are prioritizing network stability by limiting token issuance. Ethereum's move to proof-of-stake in 2022 aimed to address these issues but token bloat has resurfaced. Criticisms by Crypto VC Nic Carter and Lekker Capital founder Quinn Thompson highlight Ethereum's declining transaction activity and reduced user growth, raising concerns about its investment potential. Token inflation occurs when tokens are created without restraint, impacting blockchain stability. Competitors see this as an opportunity to attract investors and improve network value through controlled token issuance.详Full story on Benzinga.com.

data.title: Argonne collaborates with industry to develop next-gen nuclear systems to meet rising energy demand in U.S.
data.description: In Lemont, Illinois, Argonne is working with various companies to develop advanced nuclear systems to address the increasing need for additional energy resources. This collaboration aims to pave the way for the next era of nuclear technology and meet the growing demand for power.

data.title: GameStop customer finds $115k Bitcoin in $13 trading card pack; shocked by discovery.
data.description: A lucky customer of GameStop in Arizona made an astonishing discovery when they found a Bitcoin (CRYPTO: BTC) worth around $115,000 inside a pack of Cardsmith's Currency trading cards that cost only $13. The pack contained a 1 BTC card with a redemption code allowing the owner to claim the full Bitcoin, which is presently valued at close to $115,000. The collector, who opted to remain anonymous, expressed surprise at the find, telling the card manufacturer that they had not considered it a realistic possibility. The Cardsmith's Currency series includes various cryptocurrencies with redemption cards.

data.title: US labor market strained: Unemployment claims reach 1,972,000, highest since Nov 2021. Powell concerned.
data.description: The U.S. labor market is currently experiencing its most significant strain in almost four years, with the number of Americans receiving unemployment benefits rising to the highest level since November 2021. According to the Department of Labor, continuing unemployment claims reached 1,972,000 in the week ended August 9, representing an increase of 30,000 from the previous week. This is the highest level recorded since November 2021 when it stood at 2,041,000. The continuing claims number indicates individuals who have submitted an initial claim for jobless benefits, remained unemployed for at least a week, and then submitted another claim.

data.title: World Liberty Financial, a DeFi platform linked to Trump's family, launches WLFI token on Ethereum mainnet. TGE set for September 1, 2025, with 20% supply transferable at launch. Trading begins at 12:00 PM UTC.
data.description: World Liberty Financial, a decentralized finance (DeFi) platform associated with the Trump family, recently announced the launch of its WLFI token on the Ethereum mainnet. The token, initially a governance-only token, is now transitioning into open circulation, marking a significant shift in its strategy. The token generation event (TGE) is set for September 1, 2025, with spot trading set to begin at 12:00 PM UTC. Initially, 20% of WLFI's supply will be transferable, while the remaining supply will be subject to community governance or extended vesting periods. The WLFI token is now tradable and transferable, with detailed instructions provided by the company for users to navigate the process smoothly.

data.title: ThingX Technology launches Nuna Pendant in 2025Q3, the world's first AI emotion-tracking pendant. Limited pre-orders open in the US.Characters: 110
data.description: ThingX, a leading health-tech brand, recently introduced its innovative NUNA™ Smart Pendant for preorder in the US, marking a significant shift from its previous product, PieX. The pendant is designed to enhance emotional wellbeing and is the result of 20 years of research and development. This announcement hints at a new chapter in ThingX's approach to human-centered technology, symbolizing a fresh era for the company. Limited pre-orders for the NUNA™ Smart Pendant are now available, signaling a new direction for ThingX in addressing emotional health needs in the US market.

data.title: InvestN.AI introduces AI-driven trading tech to democratize financial markets access, catering to all traders.
data.description: On August 24, 2025, in New York, InvestN.AI, a fintech firm, unveiled its cutting-edge AI-powered trading technology. The platform aims to democratize financial markets, catering to both experienced traders and novices. This launch signifies a significant step in making trading more inclusive and accessible to all.

data.title: Wall Street and crypto companies clash in DC over new regulatory bills as GOP aims for stricter laws. Traditional banks fear market disruptions.
data.description: A heightened lobbying clash is emerging in Washington between conventional banks and cryptocurrency firms as they compete for regulatory support. The focus is on the Republican party's drive to enact fresh regulations for digital currencies. The cryptocurrency sector has seen multiple wins in lobbying efforts since President Donald Trump's reelection, culminating in the initial overhaul of digital asset regulations. With Republicans gearing up to pass a more comprehensive bill aimed at bolstering the crypto market, concerns are being raised by factions of Wall Street. Traditional financial establishments fear that certain pro-crypto reforms being proposed could disrupt their operations and pose risks to financial stability. As per details from a Politico report, these tensions highlight the ongoing struggle for influence in shaping the future regulatory landscape.

data.title: Saylor signals third consecutive August Bitcoin buy as Strategy continues treasury accumulation despite share price dip.
data.description: Despite a decline in share prices since reaching a peak in November 2024, the company's strategy remains focused on acquiring Bitcoin for its corporate treasury. This decision highlights the ongoing commitment to accumulating the digital currency, emphasizing the company's belief in its long-term value and potential for growth. The company's perseverance in this strategy is evident despite fluctuations in the market, showcasing a dedication to diversifying its assets and embracing the opportunities presented by cryptocurrencies. This bold move signifies a bullish outlook on Bitcoin and underscores the company's confidence in its ability to serve as a valuable asset in the corporate treasury, irrespective of short-term market volatilities.

data.title: Azra Tech partners with Neptune Shipping Lines to enhance green maritime solutions; applied eco hull coating in July 2022.
data.description: Azra Tech, a trailblazer in sustainable marine technologies, has revealed a key partnership with Neptune Lines Shipping and Managing Enterprises SA, a prominent short-sea car carrier operator in Europe and the Mediterranean. This collaboration aims to drive innovation in environmentally friendly vessel operations. In a significant development in July 2022, Azra Tech implemented its innovative biocide-free, ultra-low-friction hull coating system on the Neptune Aegli at Odessos Shipyard in Bulgaria. This move underscores Azra Tech's commitment to reducing carbon emissions and enhancing marine sustainability.

data.title: QuickBooks named Best AI Expense Tool by Better Business Advice in 2025 report for AI-Driven Expense Management Agent.
data.description: A company called Better Business Advice has recently awarded QuickBooks as the Best AI Expense Tracking and Categorization Tool of 2025. This recognition was due to the platform's AI-Driven Expense Management Agent, which effectively tackles a significant operational issue. QuickBooks stood out among competitors in the industry, showcasing its capability in efficiently tracking and categorizing expenses using advanced artificial intelligence technology. This acknowledgment signifies QuickBooks' excellence in this field and solidifies its position as a top choice for businesses seeking innovative expense management solutions.

data.title: Fed chief Powell's speech boosts S&P 500, Dow Jones to new highs. Nvidia earnings to test market after rally.
data.description: The Federal Reserve Chairman Jerome Powell's cautious remarks prompted a significant surge in the market on Friday. Both the S&P 500 and Dow Jones indices reached record levels, while multiple stocks showed signs indicating it was a good time to buy. Investors are now eagerly awaiting Nvidia's upcoming earnings report, which is expected to be a crucial test for the market following the boost led by Powell's speech.

data.title: AI-driven dental revenue platform, Wisdom, raises $28M in funding to enhance innovation and expand.
data.description: In the healthcare industry, AI has gained significant importance in revenue cycle management. However, there has been a lack of modern tools in the dental market compared to medical practices. Wisdom, an AI-powered dental RCM platform, aims to address this issue. The company recently completed a successful $21 million Series A funding round, with Permanent Capital Ventures (PCV) leading the investment. PCV is a venture capital firm known for collaborating with entrepreneurs to support their ventures.

data.title: Crypto sees upward trend post-Powell briefing; ETH nears ATH. BTC cautious on Fed, ETH to hit $20k. CFTC announces 'Crypto Sprint'. UBS reports 5% China crypto allocation. SBI ventures into token stocks. Ripple, SBI to launch new coin in Japan. India, Australia crypto regulations in spotlight.
data.description: Bitcoin (BTC) experienced a decline following a hawkish stance from the Federal Reserve and anticipation for the Jackson Hole symposium. BTC exchange-traded funds (ETFs) are currently on a 5-day losing streak. On the other hand, Ethereum (ETH) is expected to see significant growth, as predicted by JP Morgan, with Arthur Hayes forecasting a $20k price for ETH in this cycle. Notably, 27% of decentralized autonomous treasuries (DATs) are now trading with a modified net asset value (mNAV) below 1. The Commodity Futures Trading Commission (CFTC) has introduced the 'Crypto Sprint Initiative'. In other news, Eric Trump is set to promote cryptocurrencies during his visit to Japan. The Department of Justice (DoJ) assures that it will not target cryptocurrency developers without criminal intent. Additionally, MetaMask has launched the mUSD stablecoin, while the European Union is hastening its plans for Euro-backed stablecoins. UBS reveals that Chinese family offices are allocating 5% of their portfolios to cryptocurrencies. SBI in Japan is expanding into tokenized stock trading, and Ripple in collaboration with SBI is set to launch RLUSD in Japan. India is contemplating changes to its crypto tax laws, and Australia has mandated an audit of Binance.

data.title: Fed Chair Powell signals potential policy adjustment at Jackson Hole due to rising employment risks. Job growth slowed to 35,000/month, unemployment rate at 4.2%, GDP growth at 1.2% in H1 2025.
data.description: During his speech at Jackson Hole, Federal Reserve Chair Jerome Powell addressed the increasing risks to U.S. employment, suggesting a potential shift in the central bank's policy. Powell hinted at the possibility of future rate cuts if the labor market deteriorates further. He highlighted a significant slowdown in job growth, dropping to 35,000 per month over the last three months from previous years. The unemployment rate also rose to 4.2% in July, accompanied by a decrease in labor force participation, making the job market more susceptible to potential downturns. Additionally, the GDP growth rate slowed to 1.2% in the first half of 2025, down from 2.5% in the previous year. Powell emphasized that the trajectory of monetary policy is not predetermined and mentioned the potential implementation of restrictive measures if necessary.

data.title: Heico (HEI) will release Q2 2025 earnings on Aug 25, with estimated EPS of $1.13. Historical performance indicates the potential for positive price change. Stock is trading at $307.72, up 26.52% in the last 52 weeks. Analysts suggest staying informed for insights on Heico’s market performance.
data.description: Heico (NYSE: HEI) is set to report its quarterly earnings on August 25, 2025. Analysts predict an EPS of $1.13. In the previous release, Heico exceeded EPS by $0.09, resulting in a 7.42% share price increase. Recent performance includes Q2 2025 EPS at 1.12 and a 7% price increase. Shares trade at $307.72, with a 26.52% increase over 52 weeks. Analysts have provided Heico with a rating of 9. Investors should closely watch the earnings release for guidance on future growth, which often impacts stock prices more significantly than earnings beats or misses.

data.title: Luca Netz pushes for Pudgy Penguins IPO in 2 years to ensure accountability in crypto space.
data.description: Luca Netz aims to ensure that Pudgy Penguins goes public within the next two years. The crypto-centric intellectual property holder is determined to see this goal through, with high expectations for the future of the company.

data.title: QuickBooks agents accelerate payments by 5 days. Report by Better Business Advice commends AI capabilities.
data.description: On August 24, 2025, Better Business Advice acknowledged QuickBooks for its AI Payments Acceleration features, specifically praising the platform's new Payments Agent. This technology has enabled businesses to speed up their payment reception by an average of five days. The report delves into the impact of QuickBooks' innovative approach...

data.title: Semtech likely to report higher Q2 earnings, expected at 40 cents per share and revenue of $256.06 million, up from 11 cents and $215.35 million last year. Stocks rose 1.9% to $49.39.
data.description: Semtech Corporation (NASDAQ: SMTC) will announce its second-quarter financial results after markets close on Monday, August 25. Analysts are anticipating earnings of 40 cents per share, a significant increase from the 11 cents per share reported in the same period last year. Revenue for the quarter is projected to be $256.06 million, showing growth from $215.35 million in the previous year. In the first quarter, Semtech exceeded expectations in its financial results. The company's stock price closed at $49.39 on Thursday, representing a 1.9% increase. For more details, readers can find the complete story on Benzinga.com and keep track of the latest analyst ratings in the Analyst Stock Ratings section. The ratings can be sorted by various criteria such as stock ticker, company name, analyst firm, or rating changes.

data.title: Cuprina Holdings (Nasdaq: CUPR) reaffirms commitment to shareholders amidst recent stock market activity.
data.description: In Singapore on August 18, 2025, a statement was released by Cuprina Holdings (Cayman) Limited, traded on Nasdaq under the symbol CUPR, addressing the surge in trading volume and speculative buzz. The Company, commonly referred to as Cuprina, aimed to provide clarity amidst the heightened market interest.
